name: libsereal-encoder-perl
title: libsereal-encoder-perl
summary: fast, compact, powerful binary serialization module
description:
fast, compact, powerful binary serialization module
Sereal::Encoder implements an efficient, compact-output,
and feature-rich serializer using a binary protocol called Sereal.
.
Its sister module Sereal::Decoder implements a decoder for this format.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libsereal-encoder-perl because fast, compact, powerful binary serialization module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libsereal-encoder-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libsereal-encoder-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libsereal-encoder-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
